questionHtml: Write down the time taken for one oscillation when B = 0.005 T with its absolute uncertainty.
markschemeHtml:
0.84 ± 0.03 «s»

 

Accept any value from the range: 0.81 to 0.87.

Accept uncertainty 0.03 OR 0.025.

[1 mark]

meta.title: Write down the time taken for one oscillation when B = 0.005 T with its absolute uncertainty.
